message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

class Maker as "Maker\nactor"
class Solver as "Solver\nactor"
class Puzzle {
    grid dimension
    complexity
}
class RowsColumns {
    priorities
    constraints
}
class Pixels {
    black
    white
}
class Solutions {
    general
    row/column
}

Puzzle --* RowsColumns : contains
RowsColumns --* Pixels : contains
Puzzle -- Solutions : 
RowsColumns -- Solutions : 

Maker -- Puzzle : design
Solver -- Puzzle : solve

note bottom of Puzzle: *
note top of Puzzle: 1
note right of Puzzle: *
note left of Puzzle: 1
note bottom of RowsColumns: *
note top of RowsColumns: 1
note bottom of Pixels: *
note top of Pixels: 1
note right of Solutions: 1
note left of Solutions: 1
note right of RowsColumns: *
note left of Solutions: *

@enduml
```
